sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59351" key="ko/ssai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κόσσαι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n59351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐλοί</ref> </xr> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cannons</tr_> of a horse), Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
